title: Seiko 5 Sports SRPD Series
desc: The definitive modern entry to automatic horology. We chose the SRPD for its bulletproof NH36 movement and the legendary 4 o'clock crown. Note: It gains/loses a few seconds daily — that's mechanical charm, not a defect.

title: Invicta Pro Diver 5053
desc: Powered by Seiko's NH35a automatic calibre with a genuinely tested 200m water resistance. A classic, high-contrast coin-edge bezel dive watch that punches way above its price tag for daily wear.

title: Seiko 5 Blackout Mod Kit
desc: The ultimate upgrade path for your SRPD platform. This complete kit features a matte ceramic bezel insert and a scratch-resistant sapphire crystal. It's the exact stealth build dominating watch forums right now.

title: Seiko NH36 Automatic Movement
desc: The pure mechanical heart. Features 41 hours of power reserve, reliable hacking, and hand-winding capabilities. The absolute gold standard for custom modders and horology enthusiasts rebuilding their daily beaters.
